title: rosa × dumetorum var. cinerosa
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. cinerosa, also known as the wild cinerous rose, is a variety of rose plant that belongs to the Rosa genus and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. cinerosa include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Rosa × dumetorum var. cinerosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
